lessons.title: The Three Certainties Certainty of Intention and Subject Matter
lessons.description: What is a trust? A trust arises where a person — the trustee — holds property on behalf of another — the beneficiary.

lessons.title: The Three Certainties Certainty of Objects
lessons.description: The objects of a trust are its beneficiaries. For a trust to be valid, the beneficiaries must be ascertainable with sufficient certainty.
